ownership_contract.task_goal: Freeze lock-bound runtime-consumption admission for xhs_search_notes and boss_job_search.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode assets plus read-only GitHub metadata for #261/#262 and the two downstream dependencies.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode runtime-consumption allowlist, its offline validator, and LODE-262 carrier artifacts only.
non_goals: No App, Harbor, or Core repository changes
No browser, production page, account, profile, Cookie, or session access
No runtime runner, page parsing, Core run/result, active lifecycle promotion, write action, hosted registry, marketplace, merge, or issue closeout
ownership_contract.output_format: Worktree, branch, head, changed files, validation, PR URL, and residual risk.

ownership_constraints: Static Lode asset evidence does not establish live runtime success.
Unknown operation, lock/version drift, non-HTTPS origin, write mode, and missing requirements fail closed.

delegation_evidence.rationale: The work writes one shared registry asset and its carrier; splitting ownership would create carrier conflicts.

integration_evidence: Exactly two proposed read operations are present.
Each entry is bound to manifest, package lock, registry, resource requirements, failure taxonomy, refs-only evidence, and post-check assets.
In-memory mutations prove the specified drift and policy conditions fail closed.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This Work Item changes static Lode assets and offline validation only; it has no runtime execution, browser automation, live evidence storage, or write path.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Lode local registry and downstream Harbor #245/Core #267 admission only.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to a full suite for runtime API, browser/session, Core envelope, live evidence, or write behavior changes.
